title: Record historical compaction handoff and banner particle contract
prompt: Create reports/historical-handoff-banner.md with sections for Reference-only handoff, Historical labels, Banner rails, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Historical Handoff Banner Contract

## Reference-only handoff
compaction summary prefix marks compacted history as REFERENCE ONLY and latest user message wins

## Historical labels
compaction instruction tells the model to label stale completed/pending work as historical

## Banner rails
status banners render particle rails under ambient effects for continuous chrome motion

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + compaction full/handoff vitest + banner chrome render
